Annul.desc: Grants the user a spell shield that blocks the next hostile ability.

Awe.desc: Grants a stat based on mana.

Cleave.desc: Basic attacks deal damage to enemies near the target.

Energized.desc: Gain stacks from moving and attacking, up to a maximum amount. At full stacks, the next basic attack consumes them all to grant it an additional effect on-hit.

Eternity.desc: Restores mana based on damage taken and restores health based on mana spent.

Glory.desc: Gains stacks from kills/assists up to a maximum amount and loses some of those upon death. Grants ability power per stack.

Grievous Wounds.desc: Damage against champions inflicts them with Grievous Wounds for a few seconds.

Harmony.desc: Grants heal and shield power based on bonus mana.

Helping Hand.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage against minions.

Immolate.desc: Deals damage to nearby enemies over time.

Lifeline.desc: Grants a shield or bonus health for a few seconds, mitigating damage that would reduce the user below a health threshold.

Manaflow.desc: Grants bonus mana from basic attacks on-hit and/or whenever affecting an ally/enemy with an ability, up to a cap.

Quicksilver.desc: Removes all crowd control debuffs (except Airborne) from the user.

Spellblade.desc: After casting an ability, the next basic attack within a period of time deals bonus damage on-hit and may apply additional effects based on the item.

Thorns.desc: Deals damage to enemies that basic attack the user on-hit and inflicts them with Grievous Wounds for a few seconds if they are a champion.

Time Stop.desc: Puts the user into stasis for a few seconds, granting them untargetability and invulnerability but also rendering them unable to perform any actions.

Ward.desc: Grants a number of charges that are refreshed whenever returning to the spawn. Charges can be consumed to place wards.

Anguish.desc: Every few seconds in combat with champions, deal damage to enemy champions nearby and heal yourself for a percentage of the damage dealt.

Arcane Aim.desc: On champion takedown, gain bonus attack range for a few seconds.

Bitter Cold.desc: Briefly slows enemies at low health damaged by abilities.

Blackout.desc: Disables nearby wards and reveals wards and traps. Your basic attacks deal bonus true damage to wards.

Blessing of the Mountain.desc: Reduces incoming damage for a short duration upon taking damage, afterwards unleash a shockwave that slows nearby enemies.

Boarding Party.desc: Nearby allied large minions gain bonus resistances and increased size.

Bolt.desc: Adds bonus damage on-hit and a movement speed buff to the next Energized attack.

Boundless Vitality.desc: Increases the effectiveness of healing, shielding, and health regeneration.

Breaking Shockwave.desc: Slow enemies in a radius centered around you for a few seconds. For each champion slowed, gain bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Bring It Down.desc: Basic attacks grant a stack for a few seconds, up to a maximum amount. At full stacks, the next basic attack consumes them to deal bonus damage on-hit.

Bullseye.desc: Damaging an enemy champion deals bonus damage. Attacks reduce the cooldown of this effect.

Carve.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces their armor for a few seconds, stacking up to a maximum amount.

Cinderbloom.desc: Magic and true damage critically strikes low-health enemies.

Clawing Shadows.desc: Hitting 3 basic attacks on an enemy champion within a short duration slows them for a few seconds.

Colossal Consumption.desc: Generates a stack over time on each nearby enemy champion, up to a maximum amount. Basic attacks against targets with full stacks consumes them to deal bonus damage and grant the user permanent bonus health.

Command.desc: Immobilizing an enemy champion apply a stack on the target for a few seconds. For each stack on the target, they take increased damage from all sources.

Consonance.desc: While you or any ally you've healed or shielded in the last few seconds is in combat with champions, each second, heal the lowest health nearby ally champion.

Crescent.desc: Deals damage in a radius centered around you.

Death.desc: Damage dealt that would leave an enemy champion below a health threshold causes the target to be executed.

Desolate.desc: Killing an enemy unit deals bonus damage near them.

Devotion.desc: Grants the user and nearby allies a shield for a few seconds.

Drain.desc: Restores mana each second. If you cannot gain mana, instead heal.

Dream Maker.desc: Every few seconds gains blue and purple bubbles. Upon healing or shielding an allied champion, blow both bubbles to empower them, reducing the next damaging cast source they take and increasing their next instance of damage.

Echo.desc: Gain Echo stacks. Damaging an enemy with an ability consumes all Echo stacks to deal bonus damage to them and an additional nearby enemy for each charge consumed.

Electroshock.desc: Basic attacks generate bonus Energized stacks.

Electrospark.desc: When fully Energized, the next basic attack deals bonus damage that bounces to nearby enemies.

Eminence.desc: Scoring a champion takedown grants stacking attack damage for an extended duration.

Enduring Focus.desc: Grants health regeneration for a period of time after taking damage from a champion.

Enlighten.desc: Restores a percentage of mana over a few seconds after leveling up.

Ever Rising Moon.desc: Deals bonus damage to an enemy champion hit by two separate attacks or abilities. Grants a shield for a few seconds from triggering this effect.

Everlasting.desc: Applying certain crowd control effects to an enemy champion grants a shield for a few seconds.

Extinguish.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage to wards.

Fanfare.desc: Slowing or immobilizing an enemy champion grants movement speed for a few seconds, and nearby allies gain bonus attack speed.

Feast.desc: On champion takedown, gain omnivamp for a few seconds.

Fervor.desc: Dealing damage grants bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Firmament.desc: When fully Energized, the next basic attack grants lethality and deals bonus damage.

First Light.desc: Gain heal and shield power and ability power based on your amount of base mana regeneration.

Flurry.desc: Attacking an enemy champion grants bonus attack speed for a few seconds.

Flux.desc: Champion takedowns reduce the user's ultimate cooldown by a percentage.

Focused Will.desc: Gain a stack for each instance of ability damage dealt for a few seconds, up to a cap. For each stack, your abilities deal increased damage.

Fray.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage on-hit.

Frostfire Tempest.desc: Upon casting your ultimate ability, you summon a storm of flame and ice around you for a few seconds, dealing damage periodically and slowing enemies within the area.

Galvanize.desc: Damaging enemy champions with abilities can trigger Energized effects.

Giant Slayer.desc: Deal increased damage against enemy champions, based on their bonus health.

Going Sledding.desc: Slowing or immobilizing an enemy champion causes you and the nearest and most wounded allied champion to gain bonus health and bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Goliath.desc: Gain increased size based on maximum health.

Hackshorn.desc: Damage against champions inflicts them with Grievous Wounds for a few seconds.

Hatefog.desc: Damaging an enemy with your ultimate ability creates a scorched zone beneath them for a few seconds, dealing damage over time to enemies inside and reducing their magic resistance.

Haunt.desc: Gain bonus movement speed while out-of-combat.

Heretical Cleave.desc: Deals damage to enemies in a radius.

Humility.desc: Slows nearby enemies for a few seconds.

Icathian Bite.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage on-hit.

Ichorshield.desc: Convert excess healing from life steal into a shield.

Inflame.desc: Dealing ability damage burn enemies, dealing damage over time.

Inspiring Speech.desc: Grants the user and nearby allies bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Intervention.desc: After a few seconds, heals allies in a zone and damage enemy champions within.

Juxtaposition.desc: Basic attacks against champions alternate between Light and Dark hits, each one granting a bonus for a few seconds that stacks up to a cap. Light hits grants bonus resistances, while Dark hits grant armor penetration and magic penetration.

Life from Death.desc: Scoring a takedown against an enemy champion summons a nova at their location, healing allied champions within the area.

Lightning Bolt.desc: Shocks the target enemy champion with a bolt of lightning, dealing magic damage and slowing them for a few seconds.

Lightshield Strike.desc: Your next basic attack against an enemy champion deals bonus damage and heals you. Excess healing is converted to bonus health for a few seconds.

Madness.desc: Gain increased damage the longer you stay in combat, up to a cap.

Magebane.desc: After not taking magic damage for a few seconds, gain a magic damage shield.

Magical Opus.desc: Increases ability power by a percentage.

Magnification.desc: Deal increased damage with basic attacks, based on distance.

Mana Made Real.desc: Empowers for a few seconds, increasing mana costs but gaining increased ability damage, healing, and shielding; and basic ability cooldown progress faster.

Nightstalker.desc: While out of vision of enemies for a few seconds, your next basic attack against a champion deals bonus true damage.

Now And Forever.desc: While above half health, deal increased damage. While below half health gain increasing healing and shielding.

Noxian Endurance.desc: Taking physical damage from champions grants a shield that absorbs physical damage for a few seconds.

Noxian Fervor.desc: Gain bonus adaptive force based on movement speed.

Noxian Haste.desc: Healing, shielding or buffing an ally, damaging abilities against champions and using summoner spells grants bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Noxian Persistance.desc: Taking magic damage from champions grants a shield that absorbs magic damage for a few seconds.

Opening Barrage.desc: After casting your ultimate, your next basic attacks gain bonus attack speed and critically strike. If an attack would already critically strike, it deals normal critical strike damage and also deals bonus true damage.

Overdrive.desc: Upon casting your ultimate ability, gain bonus attack speed and movement speed for a few seconds.

Plating.desc: Reduce incoming basic attack damage (excluding from turrets).

Practice Makes Lethal.desc: Basic attacks on-attack grant critical strike chance, stacking up to a cap.

Purify.desc: Removes most crowd control effects from the user or the target allied champion and heals them.

Quicken.desc: Basic attacks grants bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Rage.desc: Basic attacks grants bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Rapids.desc: Heals and shields granted to allies causes both the user and them to gain ability power and ability haste for a few seconds.

Ravenous Crescent.desc: Deals damage to enemies in a radius in front of you.

Reap.desc: Killing minions grants additional gold, up to a cap. After reaching the cap, disables the effect to grant gold.

Rebirth.desc: Revives the user when they take lethal damage.

Recovery.desc: Restores mana each second. Manaless champions instead heal.

Retribution.desc: Gain increased attack damage based on missing health.

Revved.desc: Damaging an enemy champion deals bonus damage.

Rimefrost.desc: Briefly slows enemies damaged by abilities.

Rock Solid.desc: Reduces incoming damage from basic attacks, capped at a percentage of the total damage.

Sabotage.desc: Champion takedowns makes your next basic attack against an epic monster or turret deals bonus true damage.

Sanctify.desc: Heals and shields granted to allies causes both the user and them to gain bonus attack speed and bonus damage on-hit for a few seconds.

Seething Strike.desc: Basic attacks grant stacking attack speed, up to a maximum amount. At maximum stacks, every few basic attacks apply on-hit effects twice.

Shadow.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage on-hit.

Shaped Charge.desc: Abilities deal bonus true damage to champions and epic monsters.

Sharpshooter.desc: Adds bonus attack range and bonus damage on-hit to the next Energized attack.

Shield Reaver.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces the strength of their shields for a few seconds.

Shipwrecker.desc: Generates stacks from moving, up to a maximum amount. Each stack grants bonus movement speed. Basic attacks consume all stacks to deal bonus damage hit based on the consumed amount.

Shock.desc: Damaging basic attacks on-hit and abilities against champions deal bonus damage.

Skipper.desc: Basic attacks grant a stack for a few seconds, up to a cap. At maximum stacks, the next basic attack consumes all stacks to deal bonus damage, increased against structures.

Slay.desc: Gain omnivamp for each takedown, up to a cap.

Soul Siphon.desc: Gain a percentage of damage dealt to champions as Soul Charges, up to a maximum. Healing or shielding an ally consumes all Soul Charges to restore health.

Spelldance.desc: Dealing magic or true damage to an enemy champion grants bonus movement speed for a few seconds.

Starlit Grace.desc: Heals or shields on allied champions spreads a portion of that effect to another allied champion nearby.

Steadfast.desc: Taking magic damage from champions grants a stack for a few seconds, up to a cap. Becoming immobilized grants more stacks. At maximum stacks, gain bonus magic resistance and bonus movement speed.

Sting.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus damage on-hit.

Suffering.desc: Gain increased damage the longer you stay in combat, up to a cap.

Supersonic.desc: Causes the user to dash and fire missiles that deal damage to enemies hit.

The Claws that Catch.desc: Grants bonus attack damage based on base attack damage.

Timeless.desc: Gain bonus health, mana and ability power every few seconds, up to a cap. At maximum stacks gain a level and increases all effects of Eternity.

Titanic Crescent.desc: Your next basic attack empoweres Cleave to deal bonus damage to the target and secondary targets.

Torment.desc: Deals bonus damage over a few seconds to enemies damaged by abilities.

Transcendence.desc: Basic attacks reduce the remaining cooldowns of basic abilities.

Tyranny.desc: Gain bonus attack damage based on bonus health.

Unmake.desc: Nearby enemy champions take increased magic damage for all sources.

Upgrade.desc: Can freely upgrade this item in the HUD or in the shop.

Vile Decay.desc: Dealing magic ability damage to an enemy champion reduces their magic resistance for a few seconds, stacking up to a few times.

Voidborn Resilience.desc: Each second in combat with champions grants a stack, stacking up to a maximum amount. At full stacks, increases the user's resistances until the end of combat.

Void Corruption.desc: Gain increased damage for each second in combat with champions, stacking up to a maximum amount. At full stacks, gain omnivamp.

Void Explosion.desc: Dealing ability damage to an enemy champion creates an explosion at their location that deals damage to nearby enemies.

Void Infusion.desc: Gain ability power based on bonus health.

Wraith Step.desc: Grants bonus movement speed and the ability to ignore unit collision for a few seconds.
